{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = The Lodge
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Lodge]] is [[Benri Vallenar]]'s favorite meeting-room on his starship.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c25">''The Captain'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic]] has a Lodge.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c27">''The Captain'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
